attacks.name: Energize
attacks.effect: Attach a Lightning Energy from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This is an extremely rare Pikachu card. You're very lucky to have found it!

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bolt Strike
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 40 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. In its tail, it has a giant generator that creates electricity.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: Does 10 more for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

rules:
Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Flip a coin. If heads, put 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Put a Basic Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Reveal a Pokémon in your hand and put it on top of your deck. If you do, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Look at the top 5 cards of your deck and put them back on top of your deck in any order.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

During this turn, your Pokémon's attacks do 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Remove all Special Conditions from your Active Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for a basic Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Put 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Revenge
attacks.effect: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, this attack does 70 more damage.

attacks.name: Head Charge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

attacks.name: Double Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.

attacks.name: Tail Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Do the Wave
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.

attacks.name: Tail Slap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.

attacks.name: Doubleslap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.

attacks.name: Fly
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females' flying abilities surpass those of the males.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: It can return to its Trainer's location regardless of the distance separating them.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Each follows its Trainer's orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.

attacks.name: Odor Sleuth
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Giga Impact
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: This extremely wise Pokémon excels at rescuing people stranded at sea or in the mountains.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw 3 cards.

flavorText: It loyally follows its Trainer's orders. For ages, they have helped Trainers raise Pokémon.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

flavorText: The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.

attacks.name: Pickup
attacks.effect: Put an Item card from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Hyper Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: They make the patterns on their bodies shine in order to threaten predators. Keen eyesight lets them see in the dark.

attacks.name: Hyper Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Extremely cautious, they take shifts to maintain a constant watch of their nest. They feel insecure without a lookout.
Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watches for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.

attacks.name: Gear Grind
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.

attacks.name: Bind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Gear Grind
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.

attacks.name: Bind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

attacks.name: Blindside
attacks.effect: Does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Punishment
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Stage 2 Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavorText: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.

attacks.name: Surprise Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Its wings are too tiny to allow it to fly. As the time approaches for it to evolve, it discards the bones it was wearing.

attacks.name: Nasty Plot
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Foul Play
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.

flavorText: Each has the ability to fool a large group of people simultaneously. They protect their lair with illusory scenery.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spit Acid
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is also Paralyzed.

flavorText: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.
Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.

attacks.name: Taunt
attacks.effect: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sucker Punch
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Darkness Energy attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Stealthily, it sneaks up on its target, striking from behind before its victim has a chance to react.
Its cute act is a ruse. When victims let down their guard, they find their items taken. It attacks with sharp claws.

attacks.name: Torment
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Krookoroll
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavorText: It can expand the focus of its eyes, enabling it to see objects in the far distance as if it were using binoculars.

attacks.name: Torment
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: The special membrane covering its eyes can sense the heat of objects, so it can see its surroundings even in darkness.

attacks.name: Sand Tomb
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It moves along below the sand's surface, except for its nose and eyes. A dark membrane shields its eyes from the sun.
The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.

attacks.name: Circle Throw
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Storm Throw
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: When they encounter foes bigger than themselves, they try to throw them. They always travel in packs of five.

attacks.name: Bulk Up
attacks.effect: During your next turn, each of this Pokémon's attacks does 20 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: They strengthen their bodies by carrying steel beams. They show off their big muscles to their friends.
These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.
It fights by swinging a piece of timber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.

attacks.name: Psywave
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: These remarkably intelligent Pokémon fight by controlling arms that can grip with rock-crushing power.

attacks.name: Recover
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon and heal all damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: When their brains, now divided in two, are thinking the same thought, these Pokémon exhibit their maximum power.

attacks.name: Cell Culture
attacks.effect: Search your deck for Solosis and put it into your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they can survive in any environment.

attacks.name: Steamroller
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Poison Claws
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: Highly aggressive, it uses the claws near its neck to dig into its opponent and poison them.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

flavorText: Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies.
Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.

attacks.name: Attract
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

flavorText: It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks.
Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Ray
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Dream Eater
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is not Asleep, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Dream Eater
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is not Asleep, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Bolt Strike
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 40 damage to itself.

flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. In its tail, it has a giant generator that creates electricity.

attacks.name: Electroweb
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Leech Life
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: They employ an electrically charged web to trap their prey. While it is immobilized by shock, they leisurely consume it.

attacks.name: Leech Life
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.

attacks.name: Stun Needle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.

attacks.name: Electrispark
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Wild Charge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: This ill-tempered Pokémon is dangerous because when it's angry, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use their flashing manes to communicate with one another.
When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Floating in the open sea is how they live. When they find a wounded Pokémon, they embrace it and bring it to shore.
Floating in the open sea is how they live. When they find a wounded Pokémon, they embrace it and bring it to shore.

attacks.name: Feather Dance
attacks.effect: During your next turn, each of this Pokémon's attacks does 40 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Aqua Ring
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food—peat moss.

attacks.name: Crunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they'll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.

attacks.name: Scald
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: The high-pressure water expelled from its tail is so powerful, it can destroy a concrete wall.
It does not thrive in dry environments. It keeps itself damp by shooting water stored in its head tuft from its tail.

attacks.name: Hydro Pump
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies.

attacks.name: Pike
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies.

attacks.name: Aqua Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 10 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: Scalchop techniques differ from one Dewott to another. It never neglects maintaining its scalchops.

attacks.name: Razor Shell
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Scalchop techniques differ from one Dewott to another. It never neglects maintaining its scalchops.

attacks.name: Razor Shell
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: The scalchop on its stomach is made from the same elements as claws. It detaches the scalchop for use as a blade.
The scalchop on its stomach is made from the same elements as claws. It detaches the scalchop for use as a blade.

attacks.name: Outrage
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Blue Flare
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: When weakened in battle, it transforms into a stone statue, then it sharpens its mind and fights on mentally.

attacks.name: Singe
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

flavorText: Darumaka's droppings are hot, so people used to put them in their clothes to keep themselves warm.

attacks.name: Firebreathing
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: Darumaka's droppings are hot, so people used to put them in their clothes to keep themselves warm.

attacks.name: Flame Burst
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.
When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.
It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

attacks.name: Flare Blitz
attacks.effect: Discard all Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

attacks.name: Flame Charge
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Fire Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It can deftly dodge its foe's attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.
It can deftly dodge its foe's attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.

attacks.name: Nature Power
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Grass Energy attached to both your and your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Horn Leech
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck's horns.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.

attacks.name: Constant Rattle
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. If 1 of them is heads, this attack does 10 damage. If 2 of them are heads, this attack does 30 damage. If all of them are heads, this attack does 60 damage.

attacks.name: Giga Drain
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: Arid regions are their habitat. They move rhythmically, making a sound similar to maracas.

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.

attacks.name: Petal Dance
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads. This Pokémon is now confused.

attacks.name: Leaf Storm
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your Grass Pokémon.

flavorText: The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect. It withers if a Trainer does not take good care of it.

attacks.name: Magical Leaf
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage and heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It attacks enemies with strikes of its thorn-covered tail. This Pokémon is wild tempered.
It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.

attacks.name: Leaf Tornado
attacks.effect: Move as many Grass Energy attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: They raise their heads to intimidate opponents but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent.

attacks.name: Leaf Storm
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your Grass Pokémon.

flavorText: They raise their heads to intimidate opponents but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent.

attacks.name: Wring Out
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

flavorText: They avoid attacks by sinking into the shadows of thick foliage. They retaliate with masterful whipping techniques.

attacks.name: Wrap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavorText: They avoid attacks by sinking into the shadows of thick foliage. They retaliate with masterful whipping techniques.

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.
They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.
